---
title: "Autobiography of the Rev. Dr. Alexander Carlyle, minister of Inveresk: containing memorials of the men and events of his time"
---

## Autobiography of the Rev. Dr. Alexander Carlyle, minister of Inveresk: containing memorials of the men and events of his time

**Author:** The Rev. Alexander Carlyle
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** Edinburgh: Blackwood

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
